Final response excerpt:
All four things are done and live (`c7e5646`):

## What shipped
1. **Zoom one notch tighter** — desktop fills the frame; mobile self-corrects to keep every pin visible.
2. **Real building footprints, softly tinted** — pulled the actual OSM polygons (via Overpass), stored static in `building-footprints.json`, drawn in brand green at 16% opacity in a pane *below* the pins. 10 of 11 places have a footprint (Feldberg → its Murdough Center building; Advance Transit is a bus stop, so pin-only). They're non-interactive, so pins stay the tap targets.
3. **Mobile hero/height fix** — trimmed the hero and gave the map ~68vh, so you land on pins instead of a wall of text.

## Worth knowing / your call

- **The tint is intentionally subtle**, and it's *most* visible when zoomed in — at the default ove…
